programs.title: I Heard the Bells
programs.desc: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow puts down his pen after a tragedy, until Christmas reignites his voice.

programs.title: Christmas at the Drive-In
programs.desc: A property lawyer finds romance during the holidays while trying to save her town's local drive-in.

programs.desc: The residents of Brookfield come together to celebrate Christmas alongside some familiar visitors.

programs.desc: The residents of Brookfield come together to celebrate Christmas alongside some familiar visitors.

programs.title: A Dash of Christmas
programs.desc: An executive learning how to bake inadvertently ends up entered in a Christmas bakeoff.

programs.title: Nothing Is Impossible
programs.desc: A high school janitor gets a second chance at both love and life when he tries out for an NBA team.
